hero.title: Mr Rafik Isaac
hero.subtitle: Newton's Academy
hero.description: Welcome to Newton's Academy, where we transform learning into an exciting journey of discovery and growth. Join us to explore the fascinating world of physics and mathematics.

features.title: Master Mathematics
features.description: Everything you need to excel in your academic journey, from interactive lectures to comprehensive exams.

1.title: Physics Mastery
1.description: Deep-dive into mechanics, electricity, waves, and modern physics with clear, engaging explanations.

2.title: Mathematics Excellence
2.description: Build strong foundations in algebra, calculus, geometry, and statistics step by step.

3.title: HD Video Lectures
3.description: Watch high-quality recorded lectures anytime, anywhere, at your own pace.

4.title: Quizzes & Exams
4.description: Test your knowledge with interactive quizzes and comprehensive exams to track your progress.

5.title: Progress Tracking
5.description: Monitor your learning journey with detailed performance analytics and feedback.

6.title: Structured Curriculum
6.description: Follow a carefully designed curriculum aligned with the Egyptian education system.

grades.title: Grade Levels Overview
grades.description: Explore the academic journey from middle school to graduation.

thirdMiddle.title: Third Year of Middle School
thirdMiddle.description: Final year before entering secondary education.

firstSecondary.description: The beginning of high school studies.

secondSecondary.title: Second Secondary Grade
secondSecondary.description: Further specialization and preparation for final year.

thirdSecondary.title: Third Secondary Grade
thirdSecondary.description: The last year before graduation and college entry.

seniors.title: Meet Our Seniors
seniors.description: Discover the inspiring journeys of our senior classes, showcasing their achievements and unforgettable moments

1.title: Old Seniors
1.description: Our pioneering class that set the foundation for excellence and achievement

2.title: Seniors'22
2.description: A remarkable class that demonstrated exceptional dedication and success

3.title: Seniors'23
3.description: Our latest graduating class, leaving behind a legacy of innovation and accomplishment

memories.title: Make Memories with us
memories.description: Every moment spent learning becomes a cherished memory

1.title: Class Celebration
1.description: Joyful moments of achievement and celebration with our students

2.title: Study Groups
2.description: Collaborative learning sessions that foster growth and friendship

3.title: Lab Sessions
3.description: Hands-on experiments that bring physics to life

4.title: Team Projects
4.description: Innovative projects that showcase student creativity and teamwork

5.title: Graduation Day
5.description: Proud moments celebrating our students' achievements and future

6.title: Special Events
6.description: Unique experiences that make learning memorable and fun

about.title: Who's Mr Rafik?
about.description: Learn about the journey and expertise of our dedicated instructor

1.title: Early Career
1.description: Started teaching in the 2000s at the Good Shepherd School, where he honed his expertise in innovative teaching methods

2.title: Current Position
2.description: Teaching at Saint Mary's School, delivering engaging lessons designed to inspire and empower students to excel

3.title: Online Teaching
3.description: Over 5 years of experience in online education, leveraging cutting-edge tools to create dynamic learning experiences

footer.tagline: Empowering students to master physics and mathematics through innovative online education.

platformInstructions.title: Newton's Academy Instructions
platformInstructions.subtitle: Please read carefully before proceeding
instructions: The platform is a website available on Google Chrome or Firefox browsers only.
The platform must be opened from a mobile phone, computer, or laptop. The use of school tablets is strictly prohibited as they are not qualified to use the platform, even if they are hacked.
After subscription, course refund or exchange will not be available. Please make sure of the course you want to subscribe to. 🚫
The account is for your personal use only and sharing it with friends is not allowed. If account sharing is discovered, it will be permanently closed.
You must use strong and stable internet, preferably a stable Wi-Fi network.
When registering on the platform, you must ensure the accuracy of your data to ensure proper periodic follow-up.
The name must be written in Arabic as it appears on the ID card when registering.
Don't forget to verify your phone number and password and write this information in a safe place so you don't forget it.
You can watch one video on the platform a maximum of five times during one academic year.
A view is counted when exceeding 30% of the video duration.
You must follow the platform regularly and solve assignments and tests because there are weekly reports sent to the parent about your activity on the platform.
The platform will be available to you until the first semester exams only.
platformInstructions.acceptTerms: I accept the terms and conditions
